description: Compositor surface health — covers the metric clusters previously absent from any dashboard: HOMAGE package state + render cadence + emphasis + signature artefacts, face-obscure pipeline, follow-mode cuts, ward modulator tick health, layout switch dispatches, broadcast/degraded mode. Source: agents/studio_compositor/metrics.py on 127.0.0.1:9482. Antigrav delta gap #23 fill — populates the operator's view of the surface integrity layer. Complementary to compositor-health.json (different metric scope: HOMAGE/face-obscure/follow-mode/ward/layout/broadcast vs process/pipeline/v4l2 health).

panels.description: Active HOMAGE package (BitchX, GeoCities, OS9, etc.). Source: hapax_homage_package_active gauge — value 1.0 for the currently-active package, 0 for others. The package establishes the visual substrate (palette + typography + grammar). Sustained zero across all labels means HOMAGE rotation isn't running.
panels.title: HOMAGE package active (per package)

panels.description: HOMAGE render cadence (Hz). Source: hapax_homage_render_cadence_hz gauge — published per-tick from the compositor render loop. Steady 30 Hz expected; sustained drops signal GL stalls or budget overruns.
panels.title: HOMAGE render cadence

panels.description: HOMAGE emphasis applied rate (5m). Source: hapax_homage_emphasis_applied_total — incremented when the cascade-delta ward_render_scope applies the emphasis envelope (glow / border-pulse / scale-bump) to a ward. Sustained zero means structural-intent emphasis writes are silently dropping at render time — the surface fault that motivated the cascade-delta wiring.
panels.title: HOMAGE emphasis applied (5m rate, per ward)

panels.description: HOMAGE signature artefact emission rate (5m). Source: hapax_homage_signature_artefact_emitted_total — each authentic-asset surface (BitchX splash quote, GeoCities banner, etc.) increments on emission. Confirms the homage rotation is composing signature artefacts on the broadcast.
panels.title: HOMAGE signature artefacts (5m rate, per kind)

panels.description: Face-obscure pipeline frame rate (5m). Source: hapax_face_obscure_frame_total — every camera frame that passes through the privacy-pipeline pixelator increments. Per visual-privacy invariant the rate must equal the camera frame rate; sustained zero indicates the obscure pipeline is bypassed (RTMP/HLS/V4L2 may be sourcing un-pixelated frames). Privacy-load-bearing.
panels.title: face-obscure pipeline (5m rate)

panels.description: Follow-mode camera cuts rate (5m). Source: hapax_follow_mode_cuts_total — each follow-mode hero swap increments. Per cc-task follow-mode 30s debounce (PR #2754) the rate is bounded; sustained spikes signal the debounce isn't holding (V4L2 source loss risk).
panels.title: follow-mode cuts (5m rate)

panels.description: Ward modulator tick rate (5m). Source: hapax_ward_modulator_tick_total. The ward stimmung modulator publishes per-ward properties at a steady cadence; rate confirms it's running. Pairs with hapax_ward_modulator_stale_total — when stale rate > 0, ward properties are not reaching the render path within freshness deadline.
panels.title: ward modulator tick + stale (5m rate)

panels.description: Layout switch dispatch rate (5m). Source: hapax_layout_switch_dispatched_total — increments on every legacy layout-switcher application. Pairs with hapax_compositor_layout_switch_total (per from-layout/to-layout label set). Sustained dispatched rate without compositor switch indicates KeyError-on-load (e.g. dangling layout name post-#2770).
panels.title: layout switch dispatched (5m rate, per trigger)

panels.description: Broadcast mode + degraded mode + director degraded holds. Composite: hapax_broadcast_mode (gauge — current mode tier) + hapax_degraded_mode_active (gauge 0/1) + hapax_director_degraded_holds_total rate (5m). Operator-glance for whether the broadcast surface is in nominal vs degraded posture.
panels.title: broadcast posture (mode + degraded + director holds)

title: Hapax / Compositor / Surface Health
